## Scope

- [ ] Public note
- [ ] Course-private content
- [ ] Draft or student contribution
- [ ] Repo governance or automation

## Checks

- [ ] I placed public material in `public/**`.
- [ ] I kept private course material in `cursos/**`.
- [ ] I did not publish `draft/**` by accident.
- [ ] I used a stable `slug` for any new public-facing note.
- [ ] I assigned reviewers according to `CODEOWNERS`.
- [ ] If this is a student contribution, I kept it in `draft/estudiantes/**` until review.

## If this PR promotes course material to public

- [ ] The public version was editorially refactored, not copied blindly.
- [ ] If the promotion is temporary, the course note includes `visibility: public`, `public_status: approved`, and `public_path`.
- [ ] The promoted content is not an `eval`, `lesson-presentation`, or `app-dataviewjs` note.
